claim_boundary.next_gate: If route-signature expansion remains non-robust, isolate exact compiled route families and formulate topology-specific candidate constraints.
claim_boundary.what_is_not_supported: Verifier holdout performance, readout mitigation, current calibration, provider access, hardware execution, protocol soundness, quantum advantage, BQP separation, or new B10 credit.
claim_boundary.what_is_supported: Route-signature-diverse candidate expansion and disjoint-seed compiler validation over frozen historical snapshots.

requirements.label: R129 source is hash-bound before candidate expansion
52 candidates are retained per snapshot/task group
route signatures bind route steps, excluded qubit, and edge multiplicity
all expanded candidates are compiled on eight training seeds
ten disjoint validation seeds cover selected, default, and R129 layouts
all 60 validation QASM artifacts preserve measurement order
route-expansion gate is evaluated on all six groups
verifier holdout, current calibration, and hardware remain excluded
no soundness, advantage, BQP, or new credit is claimed
